word: G831 - αὐθεντέω - authentéō - ow-then-teh'-o - Usurp authority over

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Usurp authority over
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
one who with his own hand kills either others or himself, one who does a thing himself the author
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G846 and ἕντης hentēs (obsolete; a worker); to act of oneself, that is, (figuratively) dominate: - usurp authority over.
